entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop species being investigated for Striga resistance.

entities.name: STRIGA SEED-GERMINATION STIMULANT
entities.description: A chemical signal produced by sorghum that triggers the germination of Striga seeds.

entities.name: STRIGA ASIATICA
entities.description: A parasitic weed whose seed germination is stimulated by sorghum.

entities.name: ICRISAT CENTRE
entities.description: The facility where S. asiatica seeds were collected.

entities.name: LOW STIMULANT PRODUCTION
entities.description: A resistance characteristic in sorghum cultivars associated with reduced production of the germination stimulant.

entities.name: HIGH STIMULANT PRODUCTION
entities.description: A susceptibility characteristic in sorghum cultivars associated with high production of the germination stimulant.

entities.name: GENETIC CROSSING
entities.description: The process of creating F1, F2, and backcross progenies to study trait inheritance.

entities.name: SINGLE RECESSIVE ALLELE
entities.description: The genetic unit identified as controlling the low stimulant production trait.
